definition: To get or take something given.
sentence_context: You will receive a prize for winning.
It is hard to separate the two pieces.
The pharaoh was buried in a pyramid.

definition: To think that something is true.
sentence_context: I believe in you.
You can achieve anything with hard work.

definition: The overhead surface of a room.
sentence_context: The ceiling was painted light blue.
She traveled to many foreign lands.

definition: A person who lives near you.
sentence_context: My neighbor is very kind.
He caught the ball with one hand.
I bought a new book yesterday.
I had a sudden thought about the project.
My daughter loves to play soccer.
The room was filled with laughter.
Draw a straight line with the ruler.
He lifted the heavy weight.
We have enough food for everyone.

The meat was very tough to chew.

definition: From one side to the other.
sentence_context: The train went through the tunnel.
The island was covered in palm trees.
